shuffle_options.C: Serologic testing for antihelminth antibodies and inspection of stool for ova and parasites
shuffle_options.D: Corticosteroids, 60 mg prednisone equivalent, by mouth daily

shuffle_options.B: Observe and follow up in 3 months
Check blood pressure and obtain complete blood cell count and metabolic panel
shuffle_options.C: Send for infectious and inflammatory laboratory workup and start oral prednisone
shuffle_options.D: Perform bilateral pars plana vitrectomy with or without scleral buckle for retinal detachment repair
Refer to rheumatology for additional autoimmune workup
